name: examples-browser
description: Examples browser for the PlayCanvas Engine

scripts.dev: npm run -s build:metadata && cross-env NODE_ENV=development vite
scripts.dev:https: npm run -s build:metadata && cross-env NODE_ENV=development EXAMPLES_HTTPS=1 vite
scripts.develop: npm run -s build:metadata && cross-env NODE_ENV=development EXAMPLES_AUTO_RELOAD=false vite
scripts.develop:https: npm run -s build:metadata && cross-env NODE_ENV=development EXAMPLES_AUTO_RELOAD=false EXAMPLES_HTTPS=1 vite
scripts.type:check: npm run -s type:check:app && npm run -s type:check:examples
scripts.type:check:app: npm run -s build:metadata && tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --pretty false

author: PlayCanvas <support@playcanvas.com>
